overall.description: A video game scene featuring a large classical institutional building with stone columns and brick wings. The camera slowly moves from the front facade along the side of the building, revealing surrounding grounds with trees and a dirt path. PlayStation controller UI prompts are visible at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic building front facade with classical columns

agents.ego_description: slowly panning upward across the building's front facade, examining the architectural details and columns

entered.detail: light-colored stone facade with four large columns and decorative upper structure
four tall classical columns supporting the triangular pediment
ornate triangular stone pediment with carved decorative elements
tall rectangular windows with grid patterns on the front facade
stone balustrade railing along the top edge of the building
red brick side wing of the building visible at the left edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the front of a grand classical building with tall stone columns and a decorative pediment. The camera slowly pans upward and left, revealing the ornate architectural details of the facade while the brick side wing becomes more prominent on the left. The sky is partly cloudy and the scene is devoid of people.

scene_state.functional_zone: building side path with lawn and distant trees

events.description: camera moves from front facade to the side of the building, revealing the long brick wing and surrounding grounds

agents.ego_description: walking along the side path of the building, moving away from the front facade toward the grounds

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and gravel walkway running alongside the building
grassy area with scattered trees alongside the building
line of green leafy trees in the distance beyond the lawn

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to the side of the building, revealing the long red brick wing with rows of windows. As the camera moves forward along the dirt path, the front facade recedes to the right and eventually out of view, while the surrounding landscape with lawn and distant trees becomes visible on the left. The ground surface changes from obscured to clearly visible as a dirt trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a detailed view of a grand classical facade to a sweeping perspective along the building's brick side wing. It begins by panning upward and left across tall stone columns and a decorative pediment, emphasizing the ornate architectural details of the front entrance. As the camera moves forward, the perspective transitions toward the side of the structure, causing the front facade to recede to the right and eventually disappear from view. The scene then opens up to reveal a long red brick wing with rows of windows, while the ground transforms into a visible dirt trail flanked by a green lawn and distant trees.
